# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                        | HTTP Method | Function Name            | Template Rendered          | Route Parameters          | Context Variables (name : type)                              | Expected POST Form Data (name : type)                        |
|---------------------------------|-------------|-------------------------|----------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                               | GET         | root_redirect            | Redirects to /dashboard     | None                      | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /dashboard                      | GET         | dashboard               | dashboard.html             | None                      | featured_properties : list (each element is dict)           | None                                                         |
| /properties                    | GET         | property_search         | property_search.html       | None                      | properties : list (each element is dict)                     | None                                                         |
| /property/<int:property_id>     | GET         | property_details        | property_details.html      | property_id (int)         | property : dict                                              | None                                                         |
| /inquiry                       | GET         | inquiry_form            | inquiry.html               | None                      | properties : list (dict), errors : dict (optional)           | None                                                         |
| /inquiry                       | POST        | submit_inquiry          | inquiry.html (on error) or redirect | None                | properties : list (dict) (only on error re-render)           | property_id : int, customer_name : str, customer_email : str, customer_phone : str, message : str |
| /inquiries                    | GET         | inquiries_list          | inquiries.html             | None                      | inquiries : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST        | delete_inquiry          | Redirect to inquiries       | inquiry_id (int)          | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites                    | GET         | favorites_list          | favorites.html             | None                      | favorite_properties : list (each element is dict)            | None                                                         |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST        | add_favorite            | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST        | remove_favorite         | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /agents                       | GET         | agents_list             | agents.html                | None                      | agents : list (each element is dict)                         | None                                                         |
| /locations                    | GET         | locations_list          | locations.html             | None                      | locations : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |

### Details

### root_redirect
- Redirects from '/' to '/dashboard'

### dashboard
- Renders dashboard.html
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendation details

### property_search
- Renders property_search.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): All available properties

### property_details
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id: int
- Renders property_details.html
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Details of a specific property

### inquiry_form (GET)
- Renders inquiry.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties available for inquiry select dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation or submission errors

### submit_inquiry (POST)
- Accepts form data:
  - property_id (int)
  - customer_name (str)
  - customer_email (str)
  - customer_phone (str)
  - message (str)
- On validation failure, re-renders inquiry.html with errors and properties context
- On success, redirects to inquiries list page

### inquiries_list
- Renders inquiries.html
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): All user inquiries

### delete_inquiry (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - inquiry_id (int) to delete
- Redirects to inquiries list page

### favorites_list
- Renders favorites.html
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): All favorite properties data

### add_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to add
- Redirects to favorites list page

### remove_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to remove
- Redirects to favorites list page

### agents_list
- Renders agents.html
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Real estate agents data

### locations_list
- Renders locations.html
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Popular locations data


---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page (Div)
  - featured-properties (Div)
  - browse-properties-button (Button)
  - my-inquiries-button (Button)
  - my-favorites-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations with details like id, address, price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('inquiries_list')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('favorites_list')
- Forms:
  - None

### 2. property_search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page (Div)
  - location-input (Input text)
  - price-range-min (Input number)
  - price-range-max (Input number)
  - property-type-filter (Dropdown)
  - properties-grid (Div)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, dynamic per property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties with data such as id, price, location, beds, baths
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - None (search and filtering may be client side or using query params)

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page (Div)
  - property-address (H1)
  - property-price (Div)
  - property-description (Div)
  - property-features (Div)
  - add-to-favorites-button (Button)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Contains property_id, address, price, description, bedrooms, bathrooms, square_feet
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: Form POST action url_for('add_favorite', property_id=property['property_id'])
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('inquiry_form')
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form wrapping add-to-favorites-button

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page (Div)
  - select-property (Dropdown)
  - inquiry-name (Input text)
  - inquiry-email (Input email)
  - inquiry-phone (Input tel)
  - inquiry-message (Textarea)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): For populating select-property dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation errors keyed by field
- Navigation Mappings:
  - None
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with POST action url_for('submit_inquiry')
  - Input fields: select-property, inquiry-name, inquiry-email, inquiry-phone, inquiry-message
  - Submit button id: submit-inquiry-button

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page (Div)
  - inquiries-table (Table)
  - inquiry-status-filter (Dropdown)
  - delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id} (Button, per inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): Inquiries with details such as id, property, date, status, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Each inquiry row has a form with POST action url_for('delete_inquiry', inquiry_id=inquiry_id) containing delete button delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page (Div)
  - favorites-list (Div)
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): Favorite properties with address, price, etc.
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Per-property form with POST action url_for('remove_favorite', property_id=property_id) wrapping remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page (Div)
  - agents-list (Div)
  - agent-search (Input text)
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id} (Button, per agent)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Agent details including photo, name, specialization, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id}: No POST action defined (informational only)

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page (Div)
  - locations-list (Div)
  - view-location-button-{location_id} (Button, per location)
  - location-sort (Dropdown)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Location details including name, count, average price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - None (sorting/filtering client side or via query)

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Properties Data
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. property_id
  2. address
  3. location
  4. price
  5. property_type
  6. bedrooms
  7. bathrooms
  8. square_feet
  9. description
  10. agent_id
  11. status
- Description: Detailed information about all properties available.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  - 2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  - 3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

### 2. Locations Data
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. location_id
  2. location_name
  3. region
  4. average_price
  5. property_count
  6. description
- Description: Information about locations with property counts and average prices.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  - 2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  - 3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. inquiry_id
  2. property_id
  3. customer_name
  4. customer_email
  5. customer_phone
  6. message
  7. inquiry_date
  8. status
- Description: User inquiries about properties including status and contact info.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  - 2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  - 3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. favorite_id
  2. property_id
  3. added_date
- Description: User favorite property IDs with dates when added.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|2025-01-10
  - 2|2|2025-01-12
  - 3|3|2025-01-14

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. agent_id
  2. agent_name
  3. specialization
  4. email
  5. phone
  6. properties_sold
- Description: Real estate agents and their details.
- Example Rows:
  - 101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  - 102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  - 103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

---

# End of design_spec.md

| /inquiries                    | GET         | inquiries_list          | inquiries.html             | None                      | inquiries : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST        | delete_inquiry          | Redirect to inquiries       | inquiry_id (int)          | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites                    | GET         | favorites_list          | favorites.html             | None                      | favorite_properties : list (each element is dict)            | None                                                         |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST        | add_favorite            | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST        | remove_favorite         | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /agents                       | GET         | agents_list             | agents.html                | None                      | agents : list (each element is dict)                         | None                                                         |
| /locations                    | GET         | locations_list          | locations.html             | None                      | locations : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |

### Details

### root_redirect
- Redirects from '/' to '/dashboard'

### dashboard
- Renders dashboard.html
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendation details

### property_search
- Renders property_search.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): All available properties

### property_details
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id: int
- Renders property_details.html
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Details of a specific property

### inquiry_form (GET)
- Renders inquiry.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties available for inquiry select dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation or submission errors

### submit_inquiry (POST)
- Accepts form data:
  - property_id (int)
  - customer_name (str)
  - customer_email (str)
  - customer_phone (str)
  - message (str)
- On validation failure, re-renders inquiry.html with errors and properties context
- On success, redirects to inquiries list page

### inquiries_list
- Renders inquiries.html
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): All user inquiries

### delete_inquiry (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - inquiry_id (int) to delete
- Redirects to inquiries list page

### favorites_list
- Renders favorites.html
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): All favorite properties data

### add_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to add
- Redirects to favorites list page

### remove_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to remove
- Redirects to favorites list page

### agents_list
- Renders agents.html
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Real estate agents data

### locations_list
- Renders locations.html
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Popular locations data


---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page (Div)
  - featured-properties (Div)
  - browse-properties-button (Button)
  - my-inquiries-button (Button)
  - my-favorites-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations with details like id, address, price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('inquiries_list')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('favorites_list')
- Forms:
  - None

### 2. property_search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page (Div)
  - location-input (Input text)
  - price-range-min (Input number)
  - price-range-max (Input number)
  - property-type-filter (Dropdown)
  - properties-grid (Div)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, dynamic per property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties with data such as id, price, location, beds, baths
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - None (search and filtering may be client side or using query params)

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page (Div)
  - property-address (H1)
  - property-price (Div)
  - property-description (Div)
  - property-features (Div)
  - add-to-favorites-button (Button)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Contains property_id, address, price, description, bedrooms, bathrooms, square_feet
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: Form POST action url_for('add_favorite', property_id=property['property_id'])
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('inquiry_form')
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form wrapping add-to-favorites-button

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page (Div)
  - select-property (Dropdown)
  - inquiry-name (Input text)
  - inquiry-email (Input email)
  - inquiry-phone (Input tel)
  - inquiry-message (Textarea)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): For populating select-property dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation errors keyed by field
- Navigation Mappings:
  - None
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with POST action url_for('submit_inquiry')
  - Input fields: select-property, inquiry-name, inquiry-email, inquiry-phone, inquiry-message
  - Submit button id: submit-inquiry-button

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page (Div)
  - inquiries-table (Table)
  - inquiry-status-filter (Dropdown)
  - delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id} (Button, per inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): Inquiries with details such as id, property, date, status, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Each inquiry row has a form with POST action url_for('delete_inquiry', inquiry_id=inquiry_id) containing delete button delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page (Div)
  - favorites-list (Div)
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): Favorite properties with address, price, etc.
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Per-property form with POST action url_for('remove_favorite', property_id=property_id) wrapping remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page (Div)
  - agents-list (Div)
  - agent-search (Input text)
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id} (Button, per agent)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Agent details including photo, name, specialization, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id}: No POST action defined (informational only)

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page (Div)
  - locations-list (Div)
  - view-location-button-{location_id} (Button, per location)
  - location-sort (Dropdown)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Location details including name, count, average price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - None (sorting/filtering client side or via query)

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Properties Data
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. property_id
  2. address
  3. location
  4. price
  5. property_type
  6. bedrooms
  7. bathrooms
  8. square_feet
  9. description
  10. agent_id
  11. status
- Description: Detailed information about all properties available.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  - 2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  - 3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

### 2. Locations Data
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. location_id
  2. location_name
  3. region
  4. average_price
  5. property_count
  6. description
- Description: Information about locations with property counts and average prices.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  - 2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  - 3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. inquiry_id
  2. property_id
  3. customer_name
  4. customer_email
  5. customer_phone
  6. message
  7. inquiry_date
  8. status
- Description: User inquiries about properties including status and contact info.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  - 2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  - 3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. favorite_id
  2. property_id
  3. added_date
- Description: User favorite property IDs with dates when added.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|2025-01-10
  - 2|2|2025-01-12
  - 3|3|2025-01-14

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. agent_id
  2. agent_name
  3. specialization
  4. email
  5. phone
  6. properties_sold
- Description: Real estate agents and their details.
- Example Rows:
  - 101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  - 102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  - 103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

---

# End of design_spec.md

# GymMembership Application Design Specification

---

# Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                  | Function Name              | HTTP Methods | Template File        | Context Variables (Name : Type)                                         |
|-----------------------------|----------------------------|--------------|----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/`                         | root_redirect              | GET          | N/A (redirect)       | None                                                                   |
| `/dashboard`                | dashboard                 | GET          | dashboard.html       | None (Static welcome, buttons for navigation)                         |
| `/memberships`              | memberships               | GET          | memberships.html     | `plans` : list of dicts (each dict: membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int)) |
| `/plan/<int:plan_id>`       | plan_details              | GET          | plan_details.html    | `plan` : dict (membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int))
`reviews` : list of dicts (e.g., []) - Optional (assumed empty or extension)
|
| `/classes`                 | class_schedule            | GET          | class_schedule.html  | `classes` : list of dicts (each dict: class_id (int), class_name (str), trainer_id (int), class_type (str), schedule_day (str), schedule_time (str), capacity (int), duration (int))
|
| `/trainers`                | trainers                  | GET          | trainers.html        | `trainers` : list of dicts (each dict: trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str))
|
| `/trainer/<int:trainer_id>` | trainer_detail            | GET          | trainer_detail.html  | `trainer` : dict (trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str))
`reviews` : list of dicts (assumed optional or empty)
|
| `/booking`                 | pt_booking                | GET, POST   | booking.html         | GET: `trainers` : list of dicts (trainer_id (int), name (str))
POST: form data processing - no context passed on POST redirect
|
| `/workouts`                | workout_records           | GET          | workouts.html        | `workouts` : list of dicts (workout_id (int), member_name (str), workout_type (str), workout_date (str), duration_minutes (int), calories_burned (int), notes (str))
|
| `/log-workout`             | log_workout               | GET, POST   | log_workout.html     | GET: None
POST: form data processing - no context passed on POST redirect

---

# Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### 1. dashboard.html
- **Page Title:** Gym Membership Dashboard
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `dashboard-page` (div): Container for the dashboard page.
  - `member-welcome` (div): Welcome section with member status.
  - `browse-membership-button` (button): Navigate to `/memberships` using `url_for('memberships')`.
  - `view-schedule-button` (button): Navigate to `/classes` using `url_for('class_schedule')`.
  - `book-trainer-button` (button): Navigate to `/booking` using `url_for('pt_booking')`.
- **Context Variables:** None

### 2. memberships.html
- **Page Title:** Membership Plans
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `membership-page` (div): Container for membership plans page.
  - `plan-filter` (dropdown): Filter membership type (Basic, Premium, Elite).
  - `plans-grid` (div): Grid container.
  - `view-details-button-{plan_id}` (button): For each plan in `plans`, ID uses plan_id, button to route `/plan/<plan_id>` via `url_for('plan_details', plan_id=plan_id)`.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard` via `url_for('dashboard')`.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `plans`: Loop over to create membership cards, each dict with membership_id, plan_name, price, features.

### 3. plan_details.html
- **Page Title:** Plan Details
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `plan-details-page` (div): Container
  - `plan-title` (h1): Display `plan.plan_name`.
  - `plan-price` (div): Display `plan.price` and `plan.billing_cycle`.
  - `plan-features` (div): Display `plan.features`.
  - `enroll-plan-button` (button): Button to enroll (no route specified).
  - `plan-reviews` (div): Section for reviews.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `plan` (dict): Membership plan details.
  - `reviews` (list): Optional reviews for that plan.

### 4. class_schedule.html
- **Page Title:** Class Schedule
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `schedule-page` (div): Container
  - `schedule-search` (input): Search field for classes.
  - `schedule-filter` (dropdown): Filter by class type.
  - `classes-grid` (div): Grid container.
  - `enroll-class-button-{class_id}` (button): Enroll button for each class.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `classes`: Loop over classes list.

### 5. trainers.html
- **Page Title:** Trainer Profiles
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `trainers-page` (div): Container
  - `trainer-search` (input): Search trainers.
  - `specialty-filter` (dropdown): Filter by specialty.
  - `trainers-grid` (div): Grid container.
  - `view-trainer-button-{trainer_id}` (button): View trainer profile.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainers`: Loop over trainers list.

### 6. trainer_detail.html
- **Page Title:** Trainer Profile
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `trainer-detail-page` (div): Container
  - `trainer-name` (h1): Display name.
  - `trainer-bio` (div): Bio and experience.
  - `trainer-certifications` (div): Certifications.
  - `book-session-button` (button): Book session.
  - `trainer-reviews` (div): Client reviews.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainer`: dict with trainer details.
  - `reviews`: list of reviews.

### 7. booking.html
- **Page Title:** Book Personal Training
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `booking-page` (div): Container
  - `select-trainer` (dropdown): List trainers for selection.
  - `session-date` (input type=date): Date picker.
  - `session-time` (dropdown): Time slots.
  - `session-duration` (dropdown): Options 30, 60, 90 minutes.
  - `confirm-booking-button` (button): Confirm booking.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainers`: List of dicts (trainer_id, name).

### 8. workouts.html
- **Page Title:** My Workout Records
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `workouts-page` (div): Container
  - `workouts-table` (table): Shows history with columns date, type, duration, calories
  - `filter-by-type` (dropdown): Filter by workout types (Class, PT Session, Personal)
  - `log-workout-button` (button): Navigate to `/log-workout` (`url_for('log_workout')`)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`
- **Context Variables:**
  - `workouts`: list of workout dicts

### 9. log_workout.html
- **Page Title:** Log Workout
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `log-workout-page` (div): Container
  - `workout-type` (dropdown): Cardio, Strength, Flexibility, Sports
  - `workout-duration` (input number): Duration in minutes
  - `calories-burned` (input number): Calories
  - `workout-notes` (textarea): Notes
  - `submit-workout-button` (button): Submit workout record
- **Context Variables:** None

---

# Section 3: Data File Schemas

### 1. Memberships Data
- File path: `data/memberships.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  membership_id|plan_name|price|billing_cycle|features|max_classes
  ```
- Fields:
  - membership_id (int): Unique membership plan identifier
  - plan_name (str): Name of membership plan
  - price (str): Price as string (e.g., '29.99')
  - billing_cycle (str): Billing cycle (e.g., 'monthly')
  - features (str): Description of features included
  - max_classes (str or int): Maximum classes allowed (e.g., '8' or 'unlimited')
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Basic|29.99|monthly|Gym access, 2 classes per week|8
  2|Premium|59.99|monthly|Gym access, 5 classes per week, 2 PT sessions|20
  3|Elite|99.99|monthly|Unlimited gym access, unlimited classes, 4 PT sessions, nutrition coaching|unlimited
  ```

### 2. Classes Data
- File path: `data/classes.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  class_id|class_name|trainer_id|class_type|schedule_day|schedule_time|capacity|duration
  ```
- Fields:
  - class_id (int): Unique class identifier
  - class_name (str): Name of the class
  - trainer_id (int): Trainer identifier
  - class_type (str): Class type (Yoga, CrossFit etc.)
  - schedule_day (str): Day of the week
  - schedule_time (str): Time in HH:MM (24-hour format)
  - capacity (int): Max attendees
  - duration (int): Duration in minutes
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Morning Yoga|1|Yoga|Monday|06:00|20|60
  2|CrossFit Bootcamp|2|CrossFit|Tuesday|18:00|15|45
  3|Pilates Core|3|Pilates|Wednesday|10:00|18|50
  ```

### 3. Trainers Data
- File path: `data/trainers.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  trainer_id|name|specialty|certifications|experience_years|bio
  ```
- Fields:
  - trainer_id (int): Unique trainer identifier
  - name (str): Trainer full name
  - specialty (str): Trainer specialties (comma or & separated strings)
  - certifications (str): Certifications string
  - experience_years (int): Years of experience
  - bio (str): Trainer biography
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Sarah Johnson|Yoga & Flexibility|Certified Yoga Instructor, CPR|8|Expert in mind-body wellness and injury prevention
  2|Mike Thompson|Strength & Conditioning|NASM-CPT, CrossFit Level 2|10|Specializes in powerlifting and functional fitness
  3|Emma Davis|Pilates|Pilates Method Alliance Certified|6|Focus on core strength and postural alignment
  ```

### 4. Bookings Data
- File path: `data/bookings.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  booking_id|member_name|trainer_id|booking_date|booking_time|duration_minutes|status
  ```
- Fields:
  - booking_id (int): Unique booking identifier
  - member_name (str): Booker's name
  - trainer_id (int): Trainer identifier
  - booking_date (str): Date YYYY-MM-DD
  - booking_time (str): Time HH:MM
  - duration_minutes (int): Duration of session
  - status (str): Booking status (Confirmed, Pending, etc.)
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-20|10:00|60|Confirmed
  2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-21|14:00|45|Confirmed
  3|Alex Johnson|3|2025-01-22|16:00|60|Pending
  ```

### 5. Workouts Data
- File path: `data/workouts.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  workout_id|member_name|workout_type|workout_date|duration_minutes|calories_burned|notes
  ```
- Fields:
  - workout_id (int): Unique workout record identifier
  - member_name (str): User name
  - workout_type (str): Category e.g. Cardio, Strength
  - workout_date (str): Date YYYY-MM-DD
  - duration_minutes (int): Duration in minutes
  - calories_burned (int): Estimated calories
  - notes (str): Additional notes
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|Cardio|2025-01-15|45|350|Morning run on treadmill
  2|Jane Smith|Strength|2025-01-16|60|420|Upper body weight training with trainer
  3|Alex Johnson|Class|2025-01-17|50|380|CrossFit Bootcamp session
  ```

---

End of Design Specification.

# GymMembership Application Design Specification

---

# Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                  | Function Name              | HTTP Methods | Template File        | Context Variables (Name : Type)                                         |
|-----------------------------|----------------------------|--------------|----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/`                         | root_redirect              | GET          | N/A (redirect)       | None                                                                   |
| `/dashboard`                | dashboard                 | GET          | dashboard.html       | None (Static welcome, buttons for navigation)                         |
| `/memberships`              | memberships               | GET          | memberships.html     | `plans` : list of dicts (each dict: membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int)) |
| `/plan/<int:plan_id>`       | plan_details              | GET          | plan_details.html    | `plan` : dict (membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int))
`reviews` : list of dicts (e.g., []) - Optional (assumed empty or extension)
|
| `/classes`                 | class_schedule            | GET          | class_schedule.html  | `classes` : list of dicts (each dict: class_id (int), class_name (str), trainer_id (int), class_type (str), schedule_day (str), schedule_time (str), capacity (int), duration (int))
|
| `/trainers`                | trainers                  | GET          | trainers.html        | `trainers` : list of dicts (each dict: trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str))
|
| `/trainer/<int:trainer_id>` | trainer_detail            | GET          | trainer_detail.html  | `trainer` : dict (trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str))
`reviews` : list of dicts (assumed optional or empty)
|
| `/booking`                 | pt_booking                | GET, POST   | booking.html         | GET: `trainers` : list of dicts (trainer_id (int), name (str))
POST: form data processing - no context passed on POST redirect
|
| `/workouts`                | workout_records           | GET          | workouts.html        | `workouts` : list of dicts (workout_id (int), member_name (str), workout_type (str), workout_date (str), duration_minutes (int), calories_burned (int), notes (str))
|
| `/log-workout`             | log_workout               | GET, POST   | log_workout.html     | GET: None
POST: form data processing - no context passed on POST redirect

---

# Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### 1. dashboard.html
- **Page Title:** Gym Membership Dashboard
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `dashboard-page` (div): Container for the dashboard page.
  - `member-welcome` (div): Welcome section with member status.
  - `browse-membership-button` (button): Navigate to `/memberships` using `url_for('memberships')`.
  - `view-schedule-button` (button): Navigate to `/classes` using `url_for('class_schedule')`.
  - `book-trainer-button` (button): Navigate to `/booking` using `url_for('pt_booking')`.
- **Context Variables:** None

### 2. memberships.html
- **Page Title:** Membership Plans
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `membership-page` (div): Container for membership plans page.
  - `plan-filter` (dropdown): Filter membership type (Basic, Premium, Elite).
  - `plans-grid` (div): Grid container.
  - `view-details-button-{plan_id}` (button): For each plan in `plans`, ID uses plan_id, button to route `/plan/<plan_id>` via `url_for('plan_details', plan_id=plan_id)`.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard` via `url_for('dashboard')`.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `plans`: Loop over to create membership cards, each dict with membership_id, plan_name, price, features.

### 3. plan_details.html
- **Page Title:** Plan Details
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `plan-details-page` (div): Container
  - `plan-title` (h1): Display `plan.plan_name`.
  - `plan-price` (div): Display `plan.price` and `plan.billing_cycle`.
  - `plan-features` (div): Display `plan.features`.
  - `enroll-plan-button` (button): Button to enroll (no route specified).
  - `plan-reviews` (div): Section for reviews.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `plan` (dict): Membership plan details.
  - `reviews` (list): Optional reviews for that plan.

### 4. class_schedule.html
- **Page Title:** Class Schedule
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `schedule-page` (div): Container
  - `schedule-search` (input): Search field for classes.
  - `schedule-filter` (dropdown): Filter by class type.
  - `classes-grid` (div): Grid container.
  - `enroll-class-button-{class_id}` (button): Enroll button for each class.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `classes`: Loop over classes list.

### 5. trainers.html
- **Page Title:** Trainer Profiles
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `trainers-page` (div): Container
  - `trainer-search` (input): Search trainers.
  - `specialty-filter` (dropdown): Filter by specialty.
  - `trainers-grid` (div): Grid container.
  - `view-trainer-button-{trainer_id}` (button): View trainer profile.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainers`: Loop over trainers list.

### 6. trainer_detail.html
- **Page Title:** Trainer Profile
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `trainer-detail-page` (div): Container
  - `trainer-name` (h1): Display name.
  - `trainer-bio` (div): Bio and experience.
  - `trainer-certifications` (div): Certifications.
  - `book-session-button` (button): Book session.
  - `trainer-reviews` (div): Client reviews.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainer`: dict with trainer details.
  - `reviews`: list of reviews.

### 7. booking.html
- **Page Title:** Book Personal Training
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `booking-page` (div): Container
  - `select-trainer` (dropdown): List trainers for selection.
  - `session-date` (input type=date): Date picker.
  - `session-time` (dropdown): Time slots.
  - `session-duration` (dropdown): Options 30, 60, 90 minutes.
  - `confirm-booking-button` (button): Confirm booking.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainers`: List of dicts (trainer_id, name).

### 8. workouts.html
- **Page Title:** My Workout Records
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `workouts-page` (div): Container
  - `workouts-table` (table): Shows history with columns date, type, duration, calories
  - `filter-by-type` (dropdown): Filter by workout types (Class, PT Session, Personal)
  - `log-workout-button` (button): Navigate to `/log-workout` (`url_for('log_workout')`)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Navigate to `/dashboard`
- **Context Variables:**
  - `workouts`: list of workout dicts

### 9. log_workout.html
- **Page Title:** Log Workout
- **Elements with IDs:**
  - `log-workout-page` (div): Container
  - `workout-type` (dropdown): Cardio, Strength, Flexibility, Sports
  - `workout-duration` (input number): Duration in minutes
  - `calories-burned` (input number): Calories
  - `workout-notes` (textarea): Notes
  - `submit-workout-button` (button): Submit workout record
- **Context Variables:** None

---

# Section 3: Data File Schemas

### 1. Memberships Data
- File path: `data/memberships.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  membership_id|plan_name|price|billing_cycle|features|max_classes
  ```
- Fields:
  - membership_id (int): Unique membership plan identifier
  - plan_name (str): Name of membership plan
  - price (str): Price as string (e.g., '29.99')
  - billing_cycle (str): Billing cycle (e.g., 'monthly')
  - features (str): Description of features included
  - max_classes (str or int): Maximum classes allowed (e.g., '8' or 'unlimited')
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Basic|29.99|monthly|Gym access, 2 classes per week|8
  2|Premium|59.99|monthly|Gym access, 5 classes per week, 2 PT sessions|20
  3|Elite|99.99|monthly|Unlimited gym access, unlimited classes, 4 PT sessions, nutrition coaching|unlimited
  ```

### 2. Classes Data
- File path: `data/classes.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  class_id|class_name|trainer_id|class_type|schedule_day|schedule_time|capacity|duration
  ```
- Fields:
  - class_id (int): Unique class identifier
  - class_name (str): Name of the class
  - trainer_id (int): Trainer identifier
  - class_type (str): Class type (Yoga, CrossFit etc.)
  - schedule_day (str): Day of the week
  - schedule_time (str): Time in HH:MM (24-hour format)
  - capacity (int): Max attendees
  - duration (int): Duration in minutes
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Morning Yoga|1|Yoga|Monday|06:00|20|60
  2|CrossFit Bootcamp|2|CrossFit|Tuesday|18:00|15|45
  3|Pilates Core|3|Pilates|Wednesday|10:00|18|50
  ```

### 3. Trainers Data
- File path: `data/trainers.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  trainer_id|name|specialty|certifications|experience_years|bio
  ```
- Fields:
  - trainer_id (int): Unique trainer identifier
  - name (str): Trainer full name
  - specialty (str): Trainer specialties (comma or & separated strings)
  - certifications (str): Certifications string
  - experience_years (int): Years of experience
  - bio (str): Trainer biography
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Sarah Johnson|Yoga & Flexibility|Certified Yoga Instructor, CPR|8|Expert in mind-body wellness and injury prevention
  2|Mike Thompson|Strength & Conditioning|NASM-CPT, CrossFit Level 2|10|Specializes in powerlifting and functional fitness
  3|Emma Davis|Pilates|Pilates Method Alliance Certified|6|Focus on core strength and postural alignment
  ```

### 4. Bookings Data
- File path: `data/bookings.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  booking_id|member_name|trainer_id|booking_date|booking_time|duration_minutes|status
  ```
- Fields:
  - booking_id (int): Unique booking identifier
  - member_name (str): Booker's name
  - trainer_id (int): Trainer identifier
  - booking_date (str): Date YYYY-MM-DD
  - booking_time (str): Time HH:MM
  - duration_minutes (int): Duration of session
  - status (str): Booking status (Confirmed, Pending, etc.)
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-20|10:00|60|Confirmed
  2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-21|14:00|45|Confirmed
  3|Alex Johnson|3|2025-01-22|16:00|60|Pending
  ```

### 5. Workouts Data
- File path: `data/workouts.txt`
- Format (pipe-delimited):
  ```
  workout_id|member_name|workout_type|workout_date|duration_minutes|calories_burned|notes
  ```
- Fields:
  - workout_id (int): Unique workout record identifier
  - member_name (str): User name
  - workout_type (str): Category e.g. Cardio, Strength
  - workout_date (str): Date YYYY-MM-DD
  - duration_minutes (int): Duration in minutes
  - calories_burned (int): Estimated calories
  - notes (str): Additional notes
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|Cardio|2025-01-15|45|350|Morning run on treadmill
  2|Jane Smith|Strength|2025-01-16|60|420|Upper body weight training with trainer
  3|Alex Johnson|Class|2025-01-17|50|380|CrossFit Bootcamp session
  ```

---

End of Design Specification.

# Design Specification for GymMembership Web Application

---

# Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                | Function Name         | HTTP Method(s)     | Template File          | Context Variables (with Types)                                                |
|---------------------------|-----------------------|--------------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/`                       | root_redirect         | GET                | N/A (Redirect)          | None                                                                          |
| `/dashboard`              | dashboard             | GET                | dashboard.html          | None                                                                          |
| `/memberships`            | memberships           | GET                | memberships.html        | `plans`: List[Dict] - Each dict with keys: membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int) |
| `/plan/<int:plan_id>`     | plan_details          | GET                | plan_details.html       | `plan`: Dict with membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int)
`reviews`: List[Dict] of reviews (optional, can be empty list)                  |
| `/classes`                | class_schedule        | GET                | class_schedule.html     | `classes`: List[Dict] - Each dict with class_id (int), class_name (str), trainer_id (int), class_type (str), schedule_day (str), schedule_time (str), capacity (int), duration (int)   |
| `/trainers`               | trainers              | GET                | trainers.html           | `trainers`: List[Dict] - Each dict with trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str)  |
| `/trainer/<int:trainer_id>`| trainer_detail       | GET                | trainer_detail.html     | `trainer`: Dict with trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str)
`reviews`: List[Dict] of reviews (optional)                                   |
| `/booking`                | pt_booking            | GET, POST          | booking.html            | GET: `trainers`: List[Dict] with keys trainer_id (int), name (str)
POST: form data processed, no context passed (redirect after POST)               |
| `/workouts`               | workout_records       | GET                | workouts.html           | `workouts`: List[Dict] with workout_id (int), member_name (str), workout_type (str), workout_date (str), duration_minutes (int), calories_burned (int), notes (str)                 |
| `/log-workout`            | log_workout           | GET, POST          | log_workout.html        | GET: None
POST: form data processed, no context passed (redirect after POST)      |

> **Note:** The root route `/` must redirect to `/dashboard`.

---

# Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

## 1. dashboard.html
- **Page Title:** Gym Membership Dashboard
- **Elements:**
  - `dashboard-page` (div): Container for the dashboard page.
  - `member-welcome` (div): Welcome section to show member status.
  - `browse-membership-button` (button): Navigates to the memberships page (`url_for('memberships')`).
  - `view-schedule-button` (button): Navigates to the class schedule page (`url_for('class_schedule')`).
  - `book-trainer-button` (button): Navigates to the booking page (`url_for('pt_booking')`).
- **Context Variables:** None

## 2. memberships.html
- **Page Title:** Membership Plans
- **Elements:**
  - `membership-page` (div): Container for the memberships page.
  - `plan-filter` (dropdown): Dropdown to filter membership types (Basic, Premium, Elite).
  - `plans-grid` (div): Grid container displaying plan cards.
  - `view-details-button-{plan_id}` (button): For each membership plan, button with ID including the dynamic `plan_id`. Clicking navigates to `/plan/<plan_id>` using `url_for('plan_details', plan_id=plan_id)`.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Button navigates back to dashboard page (`url_for('dashboard')`).
- **Context Variables:**
  - `plans`: List of membership dictionaries.

## 3. plan_details.html
- **Page Title:** Plan Details
- **Elements:**
  - `plan-details-page` (div): Container for the page.
  - `plan-title` (h1): Displays the `plan.plan_name`.
  - `plan-price` (div): Displays `plan.price` and `plan.billing_cycle`.
  - `plan-features` (div): Displays `plan.features`.
  - `enroll-plan-button` (button): Button to enroll in this plan (no route specified).
  - `plan-reviews` (div): Section to display member reviews.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `plan`: Membership plan dictionary.
  - `reviews`: List of review dictionaries.

## 4. class_schedule.html
- **Page Title:** Class Schedule
- **Elements:**
  - `schedule-page` (div): Container for the schedule page.
  - `schedule-search` (input): Text input for searching classes by name or trainer.
  - `schedule-filter` (dropdown): Filter dropdown for class type (Yoga, CrossFit, Pilates, Boxing, etc.).
  - `classes-grid` (div): Grid displaying class cards.
  - `enroll-class-button-{class_id}` (button): Button for each class to enroll, with dynamic class_id in ID.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `classes`: List of classes dictionaries.

## 5. trainers.html
- **Page Title:** Trainer Profiles
- **Elements:**
  - `trainers-page` (div): Container for trainers page.
  - `trainer-search` (input): Field to search trainers by name or specialty.
  - `specialty-filter` (dropdown): Dropdown filter by specialty (Strength, Cardio, Flexibility, Weight Loss).
  - `trainers-grid` (div): Grid showing trainer cards.
  - `view-trainer-button-{trainer_id}` (button): Button to view detailed profile of trainer with dynamic trainer_id in ID.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainers`: List of trainer dictionaries.

## 6. trainer_detail.html
- **Page Title:** Trainer Profile
- **Elements:**
  - `trainer-detail-page` (div): Container for the detail page.
  - `trainer-name` (h1): Displays trainer's name.
  - `trainer-bio` (div): Displays biography and experience details.
  - `trainer-certifications` (div): Shows certifications.
  - `book-session-button` (button): Button to book a personal training session.
  - `trainer-reviews` (div): Section showing client reviews.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainer`: Trainer dictionary.
  - `reviews`: List of review dictionaries.

## 7. booking.html
- **Page Title:** Book Personal Training
- **Elements:**
  - `booking-page` (div): Container for booking page.
  - `select-trainer` (dropdown): Dropdown listing all trainers by name.
  - `session-date` (input type="date"): Date selection field.
  - `session-time` (dropdown): Dropdown for selecting time slots.
  - `session-duration` (dropdown): Dropdown for session durations: 30, 60, 90 minutes.
  - `confirm-booking-button` (button): Button to confirm booking.
- **Context Variables:**
  - `trainers`: List of trainer dictionaries containing `trainer_id`, `name`.

## 8. workouts.html
- **Page Title:** My Workout Records
- **Elements:**
  - `workouts-page` (div): Container for workouts page.
  - `workouts-table` (table): Table listing workout records with columns: date, type, duration, calories burned.
  - `filter-by-type` (dropdown): Filter workouts by type: Class, PT Session, Personal.
  - `log-workout-button` (button): Button to navigate to log workout page (`url_for('log_workout')`).
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button): Button to navigate back to dashboard (`url_for('dashboard')`).
- **Context Variables:**
  - `workouts`: List of workout dictionaries.

## 9. log_workout.html
- **Page Title:** Log Workout
- **Elements:**
  - `log-workout-page` (div): Container for log workout page.
  - `workout-type` (dropdown): Dropdown to select workout type (Cardio, Strength, Flexibility, Sports).
  - `workout-duration` (input number): Input for workout duration (minutes).
  - `calories-burned` (input number): Input for calories burned.
  - `workout-notes` (textarea): Textarea for workout notes.
  - `submit-workout-button` (button): Button to submit the workout record.
- **Context Variables:** None

**Navigation Buttons/Links:**
- Buttons with IDs as specified above should be linked using Flask's `url_for()` with respective function names for navigation.
- Dynamic IDs should use Jinja2 templating, e.g. `view-details-button-{{ plan.membership_id }}`.

---

# Section 3: Data File Schemas

## 1. Memberships Data
- File Path: `data/memberships.txt`
- Format (pipe `|` delimited fields):
  ```
  membership_id|plan_name|price|billing_cycle|features|max_classes
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `membership_id` (int): Unique identifier for membership plan
  - `plan_name` (str): Name of the membership plan
  - `price` (str): Price as string (e.g., "29.99")
  - `billing_cycle` (str): Billing cycle (e.g., "monthly")
  - `features` (str): Features of the plan (comma separated description)
  - `max_classes` (str or int): Maximum allowed classes; can be integer or "unlimited"
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Basic|29.99|monthly|Gym access, 2 classes per week|8
  2|Premium|59.99|monthly|Gym access, 5 classes per week, 2 PT sessions|20
  3|Elite|99.99|monthly|Unlimited gym access, unlimited classes, 4 PT sessions, nutrition coaching|unlimited
  ```

## 2. Classes Data
- File Path: `data/classes.txt`
- Format:
  ```
  class_id|class_name|trainer_id|class_type|schedule_day|schedule_time|capacity|duration
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `class_id` (int): Unique class identifier
  - `class_name` (str): Name of the class
  - `trainer_id` (int): Associated trainer's ID
  - `class_type` (str): Type of class (e.g., Yoga, CrossFit)
  - `schedule_day` (str): Day of week
  - `schedule_time` (str): Time in HH:MM
  - `capacity` (int): Max number of participants
  - `duration` (int): Duration in minutes
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Morning Yoga|1|Yoga|Monday|06:00|20|60
  2|CrossFit Bootcamp|2|CrossFit|Tuesday|18:00|15|45
  3|Pilates Core|3|Pilates|Wednesday|10:00|18|50
  ```

## 3. Trainers Data
- File Path: `data/trainers.txt`
- Format:
  ```
  trainer_id|name|specialty|certifications|experience_years|bio
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `trainer_id` (int): Unique trainer identifier
  - `name` (str): Full name of trainer
  - `specialty` (str): Specialties (e.g., Yoga & Flexibility)
  - `certifications` (str): Certifications list
  - `experience_years` (int): Years of experience
  - `bio` (str): Biography
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Sarah Johnson|Yoga & Flexibility|Certified Yoga Instructor, CPR|8|Expert in mind-body wellness and injury prevention
  2|Mike Thompson|Strength & Conditioning|NASM-CPT, CrossFit Level 2|10|Specializes in powerlifting and functional fitness
  3|Emma Davis|Pilates|Pilates Method Alliance Certified|6|Focus on core strength and postural alignment
  ```

## 4. Bookings Data
- File Path: `data/bookings.txt`
- Format:
  ```
  booking_id|member_name|trainer_id|booking_date|booking_time|duration_minutes|status
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `booking_id` (int): Unique booking identifier
  - `member_name` (str): Name of the member booking
  - `trainer_id` (int): Trainer's id
  - `booking_date` (str): Date in YYYY-MM-DD
  - `booking_time` (str): Time in HH:MM
  - `duration_minutes` (int): Duration of session
  - `status` (str): Status of booking (e.g., Confirmed, Pending)
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-20|10:00|60|Confirmed
  2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-21|14:00|45|Confirmed
  3|Alex Johnson|3|2025-01-22|16:00|60|Pending
  ```

## 5. Workouts Data
- File Path: `data/workouts.txt`
- Format:
  ```
  workout_id|member_name|workout_type|workout_date|duration_minutes|calories_burned|notes
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `workout_id` (int): Unique workout record identifier
  - `member_name` (str): Member's name
  - `workout_type` (str): Type of workout (Cardio, Strength, etc.)
  - `workout_date` (str): Date YYYY-MM-DD
  - `duration_minutes` (int): Duration in minutes
  - `calories_burned` (int): Calories burned
  - `notes` (str): Notes
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|Cardio|2025-01-15|45|350|Morning run on treadmill
  2|Jane Smith|Strength|2025-01-16|60|420|Upper body weight training with trainer
  3|Alex Johnson|Class|2025-01-17|50|380|CrossFit Bootcamp session
  ```

---

_End of Design Specification._

# Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                | Function Name         | HTTP Method(s)     | Template File          | Context Variables (with Types)                                                |
|---------------------------|-----------------------|--------------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/`                       | root_redirect         | GET                | N/A (Redirect)          | None                                                                          |
| `/dashboard`              | dashboard             | GET                | dashboard.html          | None                                                                          |
| `/memberships`            | memberships           | GET                | memberships.html        | `plans`: List[Dict] - Each dict with keys: membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int) |
| `/plan/<int:plan_id>`     | plan_details          | GET                | plan_details.html       | `plan`: Dict with membership_id (int), plan_name (str), price (str), billing_cycle (str), features (str), max_classes (str/int)
`reviews`: List[Dict] of reviews (optional, can be empty list)                  |
| `/classes`                | class_schedule        | GET                | class_schedule.html     | `classes`: List[Dict] - Each dict with class_id (int), class_name (str), trainer_id (int), class_type (str), schedule_day (str), schedule_time (str), capacity (int), duration (int)   |
| `/trainers`               | trainers              | GET                | trainers.html           | `trainers`: List[Dict] - Each dict with trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str)  |
| `/trainer/<int:trainer_id>`| trainer_detail       | GET                | trainer_detail.html     | `trainer`: Dict with trainer_id (int), name (str), specialty (str), certifications (str), experience_years (int), bio (str)
`reviews`: List[Dict] of reviews (optional)                                   |
| `/booking`                | pt_booking            | GET, POST          | booking.html            | GET: `trainers`: List[Dict] with keys trainer_id (int), name (str)
POST: form data processed, no context passed (redirect after POST)               |
| `/workouts`               | workout_records       | GET                | workouts.html           | `workouts`: List[Dict] with workout_id (int), member_name (str), workout_type (str), workout_date (str), duration_minutes (int), calories_burned (int), notes (str)                 |
| `/log-workout`            | log_workout           | GET, POST          | log_workout.html        | GET: None
POST: form data processed, no context passed (redirect after POST)      |

  ```

## 3. Trainers Data
- File Path: `data/trainers.txt`
- Format:
  ```
  trainer_id|name|specialty|certifications|experience_years|bio
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `trainer_id` (int): Unique trainer identifier
  - `name` (str): Full name of trainer
  - `specialty` (str): Specialties (e.g., Yoga & Flexibility)
  - `certifications` (str): Certifications list
  - `experience_years` (int): Years of experience
  - `bio` (str): Biography
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|Sarah Johnson|Yoga & Flexibility|Certified Yoga Instructor, CPR|8|Expert in mind-body wellness and injury prevention
  2|Mike Thompson|Strength & Conditioning|NASM-CPT, CrossFit Level 2|10|Specializes in powerlifting and functional fitness
  3|Emma Davis|Pilates|Pilates Method Alliance Certified|6|Focus on core strength and postural alignment
  ```

## 4. Bookings Data
- File Path: `data/bookings.txt`
- Format:
  ```
  booking_id|member_name|trainer_id|booking_date|booking_time|duration_minutes|status
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `booking_id` (int): Unique booking identifier
  - `member_name` (str): Name of the member booking
  - `trainer_id` (int): Trainer's id
  - `booking_date` (str): Date in YYYY-MM-DD
  - `booking_time` (str): Time in HH:MM
  - `duration_minutes` (int): Duration of session
  - `status` (str): Status of booking (e.g., Confirmed, Pending)
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-20|10:00|60|Confirmed
  2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-21|14:00|45|Confirmed
  3|Alex Johnson|3|2025-01-22|16:00|60|Pending
  ```

## 5. Workouts Data
- File Path: `data/workouts.txt`
- Format:
  ```
  workout_id|member_name|workout_type|workout_date|duration_minutes|calories_burned|notes
  ```
- Field Names and Types:
  - `workout_id` (int): Unique workout record identifier
  - `member_name` (str): Member's name
  - `workout_type` (str): Type of workout (Cardio, Strength, etc.)
  - `workout_date` (str): Date YYYY-MM-DD
  - `duration_minutes` (int): Duration in minutes
  - `calories_burned` (int): Calories burned
  - `notes` (str): Notes
- Example rows:
  ```
  1|John Doe|Cardio|2025-01-15|45|350|Morning run on treadmill
  2|Jane Smith|Strength|2025-01-16|60|420|Upper body weight training with trainer
  3|Alex Johnson|Class|2025-01-17|50|380|CrossFit Bootcamp session
  ```

---

_End of Design Specification._

# MovieTicketing Application Design Specification

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                  | Function Name            | HTTP Method | Template Rendered           | Context Variables Passed                                         |
|-----------------------------|--------------------------|-------------|-----------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                           | root_redirect             | GET         | None (redirect to dashboard) | None                                                             |
| /dashboard                  | dashboard                | GET         | dashboard.html              | featured_movies: list[dict] with fields {movie_id:int, title:str, rating:float, duration:int} (highlighted movies to display)
|                             |                          |             |                             | upcoming_releases: list[dict] with {movie_id:int, title:str, release_date:str}
| /movies                     | movie_catalog            | GET         | catalog.html                | movies: list[dict] with {movie_id:int, title:str, genre:str, rating:float, duration:int}
|                             |                          |             |                             | genres: list[str] (for genre filter dropdown)
| /movies/<int:movie_id>      | movie_details            | GET         | movie_details.html          | movie: dict with {movie_id:int, title:str, director:str, rating:float, description:str}
| /showtimes/<int:movie_id>   | showtime_selection       | GET         | showtimes.html              | showtimes: list[dict] with {showtime_id:int, date:str, time:str, theater_name:str, price:float}
|                             |                          |             |                             | theaters: list[str] (for theater filter dropdown)
| /seat-selection/<int:showtime_id> | seat_selection       | GET         | seat_selection.html         | seat_map: list[dict] with {seat_id:int, row:str, column:int, seat_type:str, status:str}
|                             |                          |             |                             | selected_showtime: dict with {showtime_id:int, movie_title:str, theater_name:str, showtime_date:str, showtime_time:str}
| /booking-confirmation       | booking_confirmation     | POST        | booking_confirmation.html   | booking_summary: dict with {movie_title:str, showtime_date:str, showtime_time:str, seats:list[str], total:float}
|                             |                          |             |                             | error_message: str (optional, for validation failures)
| /booking-history            | booking_history          | GET         | bookings.html               | bookings: list[dict] with {booking_id:int, movie_title:str, date:str, seats:str, status:str}
|                             |                          |             |                             | status_options: list[str] (All, Confirmed, Cancelled, Completed)
| /booking-history/<int:booking_id> | booking_details      | GET         | booking_details.html        | booking: dict with {booking_id:int, movie_title:str, showtime_date:str, seats:list[str], status:str, customer_name:str, customer_email:str, total_price:float}
| /theaters                  | theater_information       | GET         | theater_information.html    | theaters: list[dict] with {theater_id:int, theater_name:str, location:str, city:str, screens:int, facilities:str}
|                             |                          |             |                             | locations: list[str] (for location filter dropdown)

---

## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Filename: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Movie Ticketing Dashboard
- <title> content: "Movie Ticketing Dashboard"
- <h1> content: "Movie Ticketing Dashboard"
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page (Div): Container for the entire dashboard page.
  - featured-movies (Div): Displays featured movie recommendations.
  - browse-movies-button (Button): Navigates to movie_catalog route.
  - view-bookings-button (Button): Navigates to booking_history route.
  - showtimes-button (Button): Navigates to showtime_selection for selected or default movie.
- Navigation:
  - browse-movies-button: url_for('movie_catalog')
  - view-bookings-button: url_for('booking_history')
  - showtimes-button: url_for('showtime_selection', movie_id=<some_movie_id>) - backend selects movie_id or disable if not applicable

### 2. Movie Catalog Page
- Filename: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Movie Catalog
- <title> content: "Movie Catalog"
- <h1> content: "Movie Catalog"
- Element IDs:
  - catalog-page (Div): Container for the catalog page.
  - search-input (Input): Text input for searching movies by title or genre.
  - genre-filter (Dropdown): Select element for filtering by genres.
  - movies-grid (Div): Grid that holds movie cards.
  - view-movie-button-{movie_id} (Button): Button to view details for each movie.
- Navigation:
  - view-movie-button-{movie_id}: url_for('movie_details', movie_id=movie_id)

### 3. Movie Details Page
- Filename: templates/movie_details.html
- Page Title: Movie Details
- <title> content: "Movie Details"
- <h1> content: movie's title dynamic
- Element IDs:
  - movie-details-page (Div): Container for movie details.
  - movie-title (H1): Displays the movie title.
  - movie-director (Div): Displays director's name.
  - movie-rating (Div): Displays movie rating.
  - movie-description (Div): Displays full movie description.
  - select-showtime-button (Button): Button to proceed to showtime selection for this movie.
- Navigation:
  - select-showtime-button: url_for('showtime_selection', movie_id=movie_id)

### 4. Showtime Selection Page
- Filename: templates/showtimes.html
- Page Title: Select Showtime
- <title> content: "Select Showtime"
- <h1> content: "Select Showtime"
- Element IDs:
  - showtime-page (Div): Container for the showtime selection page.
  - showtimes-list (Div): List of showtime entries.
  - theater-filter (Dropdown): Dropdown filter for theaters.
  - date-filter (Input): Input for filtering showtimes by date.
  - select-showtime-button-{showtime_id} (Button): Button to select each showtime.
- Navigation:
  - select-showtime-button-{showtime_id}: url_for('seat_selection', showtime_id=showtime_id)

### 5. Seat Selection Page
- Filename: templates/seat_selection.html
- Page Title: Select Seats
- <title> content: "Select Seats"
- <h1> content: "Select Seats"
- Element IDs:
  - seat-selection-page (Div): Container for the seat selection page.
  - seat-map (Div): Interactive seat map container with seat buttons.
  - selected-seats-display (Div): Displays the currently selected seats.
  - seat-{row}{col} (Button): Buttons for each seat with row letter and column number, e.g., seat-A1, seat-B3.
  - proceed-booking-button (Button): Button to proceed to booking confirmation.
- Navigation:
  - proceed-booking-button: url_for('booking_confirmation')

### 6. Booking Confirmation Page
- Filename: templates/booking_confirmation.html
- Page Title: Booking Confirmation
- <title> content: "Booking Confirmation"
- <h1> content: "Booking Confirmation"
- Element IDs:
  - confirmation-page (Div): Container for confirmation page.
  - booking-summary (Div): Displays summary details: movie title, showtime, seats, total.
  - customer-name (Input): Input field for customer name.
  - customer-email (Input): Input field for customer email.
  - confirm-booking-button (Button): Button to confirm and submit booking.
- Navigation:
  - confirm-booking-button: POSTs to booking_confirmation route

### 7. Booking History Page
- Filename: templates/bookings.html
- Page Title: Booking History
- <title> content: "Booking History"
- <h1> content: "Booking History"
- Element IDs:
  - bookings-page (Div): Container for booking history.
  - bookings-table (Table): Displays booking records with columns: booking ID, movie, date, seats, status.
  - view-booking-button-{booking_id} (Button): Button to view details of each booking.
  - status-filter (Dropdown): Filter bookings by status (All, Confirmed, Cancelled, Completed).
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard.
- Navigation:
  - view-booking-button-{booking_id}: url_for('booking_details', booking_id=booking_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

### 8. Theater Information Page
- Filename: templates/theater_information.html
- Page Title: Theater Information
- <title> content: "Theater Information"
- <h1> content: "Theater Information"
- Element IDs:
  - theater-page (Div): Container for the theater information page.
  - theaters-list (Div): Displays theaters with location, screens, facilities.
  - theater-location-filter (Dropdown): Filter theaters by location.
  - facilities-display (Div): Shows detailed facilities and amenities of selected theater.
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to go back to dashboard.
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas

### 1. Movies Data
- File: data/movies.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited, exact order):
  movie_id|title|director|genre|rating|duration|description|release_date
- Description: Stores movie details.
- Examples:
  1|The Matrix|Lana Wachowski|Action|8.7|136|A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.|1999-03-31
  2|Inception|Christopher Nolan|Sci-Fi|8.8|148|A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.|2010-07-16
  3|The Shawshank Redemption|Frank Darabont|Drama|9.3|142|Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.|1994-09-23

### 2. Theaters Data
- File: data/theaters.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited, exact order):
  theater_id|theater_name|location|city|screens|facilities
- Description: Stores theater information and facilities.
- Examples:
  1|Cinema Max|123 Main St|New York|10|IMAX, Dolby, Wheelchair Access
  2|Galaxy Cinemas|456 Broadway|Los Angeles|8|3D, Premium Sound, Parking
  3|Starlight Theater|789 Park Ave|Chicago|6|Luxury Seating, Restaurant, VIP Lounge

### 3. Showtimes Data
- File: data/showtimes.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited, exact order):
  showtime_id|movie_id|theater_id|showtime_date|showtime_time|price|available_seats
- Description: Stores showtime details.
- Examples:
  1|1|1|2025-02-01|19:00|12.99|85
  2|1|1|2025-02-01|22:30|12.99|40
  3|2|2|2025-02-01|18:00|14.99|95

### 4. Seats Data
- File: data/seats.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited, exact order):
  seat_id|theater_id|screen_id|row|column|seat_type|status
- Description: Stores seat details per theater and screen including availability.
- Examples:
  1|1|1|A|1|Standard|Available
  2|1|1|A|2|Standard|Available
  3|1|1|B|5|Premium|Booked

### 5. Bookings Data
- File: data/bookings.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited, exact order):
  booking_id|showtime_id|customer_name|customer_email|booking_date|total_price|status|seats_booked
- Description: Stores booking records including seat selections.
- Examples:
  1|1|John Doe|john@example.com|2025-01-15|25.98|Confirmed|A1,A2
  2|2|Jane Smith|jane@example.com|2025-01-16|12.99|Confirmed|F10
  3|3|Robert Johnson|robert@example.com|2025-01-17|29.98|Confirmed|C3,C4

### 6. Genres Data
- File: data/genres.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited, exact order):
  genre_id|genre_name|description
- Description: Stores genre categories with descriptions.
- Examples:
  1|Action|Fast-paced movies with exciting sequences and combat
  2|Drama|Character-driven stories exploring complex themes
  3|Sci-Fi|Science fiction with futuristic technology and concepts
